moduleDescription: Introduction to RAC trade, workshop practices, PPE, first aid and safety regulations.
learningOutcome: Follow workshop safety, identify hazards and use PPE correctly.
assessmentCriteria: Follow workshop safety, identify hazards and use PPE correctly.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Identification and use of PPE correctly
Knowledge of workshop safety rules and hazards
Correct execution of first aid procedures
Handling of firefighting equipment
Workshop clean up and tool storage

moduleDescription: Basic fitting operations using hand tools and measuring instruments.
learningOutcome: Produce fitting jobs by marking, cutting, filing, drilling and threading.
assessmentCriteria: Produce fitting jobs by marking, cutting, filing, drilling and threading.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Accuracy of marking and layout
Correct technique in cutting and filing
Quality of drilling and threading operations
Precision measurement using vernier caliper/micrometer
Tool maintenance and safe execution

moduleDescription: Fabrication using sheet metal, bending, riveting and soldering techniques.
learningOutcome: Manufacture sheet metal components according to drawings.
assessmentCriteria: Manufacture sheet metal components according to drawings.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Interpretation of drawing and pattern layout
Accuracy of bending and cutting sheet metal
Quality of riveting and soldering joints
Dimensional accuracy of fabricated component
Safe handling of sheet metal tools

moduleDescription: Electrical concepts, measurements, wiring and motor connections.
learningOutcome: Measure electrical quantities and perform electrical wiring safely.
assessmentCriteria: Measure electrical quantities and perform electrical wiring safely.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Correct use of multimeters and clamp-on meters
Wiring of series and parallel circuits safely
Making correct motor terminal connections
Understanding of electrical diagrams and wire color codes
Adherence to electrical safety procedures

moduleDescription: Electronic components, soldering, rectifiers and testing circuits.
learningOutcome: Identify electronic components and construct basic electronic circuits.
assessmentCriteria: Identify electronic components and construct basic electronic circuits.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Identification and testing of active/passive components
Quality of soldering and desoldering on PCB
Assembly and testing of rectifiers and filter circuits
Use of oscilloscope and signal generators
Neatness of circuit wiring and design

moduleDescription: Gas welding, copper brazing and refrigeration pipe joining.
learningOutcome: Perform brazing and welding for refrigeration systems.
assessmentCriteria: Perform brazing and welding for refrigeration systems.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Setting up Oxy-Acetylene welding plant safely
Copper-to-copper and copper-to-steel brazing technique
Leak-proof quality of brazed joints
Safety precautions, pressure settings, and gas handling
Cleanliness and final joint inspection

moduleDescription: RAC tools, refrigeration cycle and copper tube preparation.
learningOutcome: Prepare refrigeration tubing using cutting, bending, flaring and swaging.
assessmentCriteria: Prepare refrigeration tubing using cutting, bending, flaring and swaging.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Use and care of specialized RAC hand tools
Precision cutting and bending of copper tubes
Quality and size of flares and swages
Prevention of tube flattening or crimping during bending
Safety practices in handling tubing tools

moduleDescription: Installation, leak testing, evacuation and gas charging of refrigerators.
learningOutcome: Install, service and troubleshoot domestic refrigerators.
assessmentCriteria: Install, service and troubleshoot domestic refrigerators.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Installation and leveling of domestic refrigerator
Executing pressure testing and evacuation (vacuum)
Accurate refrigerant charging (by weight/pressure)
Diagnosing electrical and mechanical faults
Compliance with safety and environment standards

moduleDescription: Compressor construction, testing, dismantling and servicing.
learningOutcome: Service hermetic compressors and test compressor performance.
assessmentCriteria: Service hermetic compressors and test compressor performance.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Testing motor windings for continuity, ground, and resistance
Dismantling and inspection of compressor mechanical parts
Testing pumping efficiency (discharge/suction pressures)
Replacing oil and terminals, and terminal re-sealing
Safe electrical testing and start-up procedures

moduleDescription: Condensers, evaporators, capillary tubes, expansion devices and refrigerant controls.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Cleaning and servicing air-cooled condensers
Testing and replacing capillary tubes/expansion valves
Checking evaporator surface and defrost controls
Testing thermostats, relays, and overload protectors
System parameters verification post-service

moduleDescription: Refrigerant recovery, recycling, retrofitting and environmental protection.
learningOutcome: Recover refrigerant safely and retrofit RAC systems.
assessmentCriteria: Recover refrigerant safely and retrofit RAC systems.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Setting up and operating refrigerant recovery machine
Measuring recovered refrigerant amount accurately
Flushing systems and changing oils for retrofitting
Charging retrofitted systems with eco-friendly refrigerants
Understanding ODS regulations and safety protocols

moduleDescription: Thermal insulation materials and prevention of heat leakage.
learningOutcome: Apply insulation to improve cooling efficiency.
assessmentCriteria: Apply insulation to improve cooling efficiency.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Identification of various insulation materials (PUF, Glasswool)
Surface preparation before applying insulation
Proper application of insulation on piping and cabinets
Securing insulation and vapor sealing
Assessing efficiency and preventing cold bridge defects

moduleDescription: Installation, servicing and troubleshooting of Window AC.
learningOutcome: Install and maintain Window Air Conditioners.
assessmentCriteria: Install and maintain Window Air Conditioners.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Selecting proper location and installing mounting frame
Dismantling and wet-cleaning filters, condenser, evaporator
Testing selector switch, fan motor, and thermostat
Finding and repairing leaks, charging refrigerant
Electrical parameters test (current, voltage) & air temp diff

moduleDescription: Installation and servicing of Split, Cassette and Inverter AC systems.
learningOutcome: Install and troubleshoot Split Air Conditioning systems.
assessmentCriteria: Install and troubleshoot Split Air Conditioning systems.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Installing indoor and outdoor units with correct clearances
Flaring, interconnecting pipes, and vacuuming lines
Commissioning, checking drain water flow, leak testing joints
Troubleshooting electronic controller (PCB) and inverter errors
Safe high-pressure refrigerant handling (R410A/R32/R290)

moduleDescription: Car AC components, servicing and gas charging.
learningOutcome: Diagnose and repair automobile air conditioning systems.
assessmentCriteria: Diagnose and repair automobile air conditioning systems.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Locating and identifying car AC components (compressor, etc)
Leak testing car AC plumbing and condenser
Servicing/replacing cabin filter and blower assembly
Evacuating and charging refrigerant using manifold gauge set
Testing clutch operation, belt tension, and duct temp output

moduleDescription: Engineering drawing interpretation, calculations and applied science.
learningOutcome: Read engineering drawings and apply workshop mathematics.
assessmentCriteria: Read engineering drawings and apply workshop mathematics.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Interpreting orthographic and isometric projections
Reading refrigeration electrical circuit diagrams
Performing calculation of area, volume, and unit conversions
Applying concepts of heat, temperature, and pressure scales
Workshop science application to cooling load estimation
